body.zh-TW: 建立新的 `ai_usage_log` 表，包含 `id`, `user_id`, `key_source`, `provider`, `model`, `feature`, `workspace_id`, `node_id`, `tokens_input`, `tokens_output`, `tokens_total`, `latency_ms`, `success`, `error_code`, `called_at` 等欄位。
body.en: A new `ai_usage_log` table is created with fields such as `id`, `user_id`, `key_source`, `provider`, `model`, `feature`, `workspace_id`, `node_id`, `tokens_input`, `tokens_output`, `tokens_total`, `latency_ms`, `success`, `error_code`, and `called_at`.
